rules.description: Employee must be a regular (permanent) employee.

cites.quote: The employee must be a regular (permanent) employee.

rules.remediation: Paid parental leave is limited to regular employees under this policy.

rules.description: Employee must have at least 12 months of continuous service.

cites.quote: The employee must have completed at least 12 months of continuous service with Acme

rules.remediation: Reach 12 months of continuous service before the intended leave start date.

rules.description: Employee must be a primary caregiver for the child.

cites.quote: The employee must be a primary caregiver for the child for whom leave is requested.

rules.remediation: Only the designated primary caregiver may claim this paid benefit.

rules.description: Request must be filed at least 30 days before the start date.

cites.quote: The employee must file the leave request at least 30 days before the intended start

rules.remediation: File at least 30 days in advance, or provide physician-documented medical emergency.
